_meta.source: Repo-defined Vietnam regulatory regime registry composed from Decision 14/2025/QD-TTg, Decision 963/QD-BCT, Decree 57/2025/ND-CP, and Decree 146/2025/ND-CP reference materials
_meta.notes: Named regulatory bundles used to resolve tariff, export-rule, and post-processing assumptions without duplicating the full Vietnam data layer. Base behavior remains decision_14_2025_current unless a different regime_id is selected.

decision_14_2025_current.label: Decision 14/2025 current retail TOU baseline
decision_14_2025_current.notes: Matches the repo's current baseline behavior with Decision 14/2025 TOU windows and Decree 57 rooftop export rules.

decision_963_2026_windows_only.label: Decision 963/2026 windows-only sensitivity
decision_963_2026_windows_only.notes: Decision 963/QD-BCT window shift with existing Decision 14 multipliers held constant.

decision_963_2026_repriced_multipliers.label: Decision 963/2026 repriced-multiplier sensitivity

rate_multipliers_overrides.notes: Illustrative placeholder for repriced multipliers once MOIT publishes a replacement table.

decision_963_2026_repriced_multipliers.notes: Placeholder sensitivity bundle for a future multiplier reissue under Decision 963.

decree57_rooftop_50pct_draft.label: Draft rooftop 50 percent surplus-export sensitivity
decree57_rooftop_50pct_draft.notes: Forward-looking draft scenario for a rooftop surplus-export cap increase from 20 percent to 50 percent.

decree146_two_part_trial_2026.label: Decree 146/2025 two-part tariff trial

postprocess_overrides.notes: Capacity payment remains a post-processing placeholder in Phase 1.

decree146_two_part_trial_2026.notes: Maps the medium-voltage trial capacity charge into a named regime without changing the base export policy.
